name: piper-station
description: Hub-lite Codex commands and skills for Piper Station project coordination.

interface.longDescription: Adds hub-lite project registration, durable per-project context, Superpowers planning, Ralph iteration, review, testing, automation policy, and handoff guidance for Codex-powered software development from a central Piper Station hub.
defaultPrompt: Register this repo with Piper Station.
Work on this registered project from the hub.
Read the project memory and run Superpowers planning.
Turn this idea into a scoped spec and Ralph-ready task queue.
Run one Ralph iteration using native Codex behavior.
Review this implementation for spec compliance and code quality.
Fix the failing tests with the smallest safe change.
Update durable project memory or decisions if needed.
